title: oreocharis cinerea
intro: Oreocharis cinerea is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the gray Oreocharis. It is a medicinal plant used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, particularly respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's leaves and stems are used to make herbal preparations, which are believed to have health benefits including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing sore throats. In traditional Chinese medicine, Oreocharis cinerea is often prepared as a tea or decoction, or used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
